prestazioni: Engine: SR20DET-R (227 PS factory, 2.0L inline-4, closed-deck, forged internals) upgraded with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, ball-bearing) on a Tomei 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold, paired with a custom 3-inch downpipe and GReddy Revolution RS 76mm cat-back exhaust system for optimized spool and top-end flow.

Fuel System: Nismo 550cc injectors (PN: 16600-60J00) with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, controlled via a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel capability, running E85 for 350+ WHP on stock internals with a Tomei 264° camshaft kit (intake/exhaust) and HKS adjustable cam gears.

Drivetrain & Suspension: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the R200 differential, paired with a Nismo 5-speed close-ratio gearbox (PN: 32000-40L00) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch. Chassis reinforcement via Cusco front strut tower bar (PN: 631 540 A) and rear subframe brace, with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (22-way adjustable damping) and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm).
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (Pandem) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, retaining the iconic GTI-R rear wing but with a 3D-printed Gurney flap for downforce. Painted in Nissan’s original ‘Black Pearl’ (KH3) with matte gunmetal accents on the fenders and hood.

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 16x9.5 +15 (front) and 16x10 +25 (rear) in gloss silver, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (225/45/16 front, 245/40/16 rear). Brake system upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (320mm front, 280mm rear) with AP Racing CP6600 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads.

Interior: Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (JDM-spec, PN: 71100-4M400) with Takata 4-point harnesses, wrapped in Alcantara with red stitching. Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (suede) on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a Defi BF Advance gauge cluster (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR) and a custom carbon fiber center console housing a Pioneer AVH-Z5000BT head unit with Focal Utopia Be tweeters.
